name: Bhog
overview: Atin brings home an enigmatic brass statue of a deity, oblivious to its sinister past. As his obsession grows, only Damri, a mysterious outcast, seems to be able to pacify the Goddess. However, with each offering made, a more malevolent force commences its awakening.

trailers.title: Official Trailer: Bhog (ভোগ) | Anirban Bhattacharya | Parno Mittra | Parambrata | 1 MAY | hoichoi
